evals.prompt: 我有一批MODIS NDVI的GeoTIFF数据（WGS84投影），需要和GDP栅格数据（Albers等面积投影）做叠加分析。请帮我检查两个数据集的CRS并统一投影。
evals.expected_output: Inspects both datasets for CRS, detects the mismatch, recommends reprojecting the NDVI to Albers equal-area, generates a reprojection script using rasterio, and reports the transformation parameters.

evals.prompt: Calculate NDVI from NIR and Red bands, then run a Mann-Kendall trend test on the 11-year NDVI time series for each pixel.
evals.expected_output: Generates a pipeline: NDVI calculation from bands, pixel-wise Mann-Kendall test, output trend and p-value rasters, with significance masking.

evals.prompt: 对这个矢量图层做热点分析（Getis-Ord Gi*），属性字段是PM2.5浓度，用距离权重。
evals.expected_output: Constructs distance-based spatial weights, computes Gi* statistics, classifies hot spots (99%, 95%, 90% confidence) and cold spots, outputs result shapefile with cluster labels.

evals.prompt: I have a shapefile of administrative boundaries and a raster of land use classification. I need to calculate the area of each land use type within each administrative unit.
evals.expected_output: Performs zonal statistics using rasterio and geopandas, handles CRS alignment, computes area per class per zone, outputs a summary table and optionally a joined shapefile.

evals.prompt: 用克里金插值方法把站点降水数据插值到1km栅格上，需要先做变异函数拟合。
evals.expected_output: Fits an experimental variogram, selects theoretical model (spherical/exponential/Gaussian), performs ordinary Kriging, outputs interpolated raster with uncertainty map, includes cross-validation metrics.

evals.prompt: 对两期土地利用分类数据做变化检测，输出转移矩阵和变化区域图。
evals.expected_output: Performs post-classification comparison, generates a land use transition matrix, identifies changed pixels, outputs change map and summary statistics table.
